risk_summary: Political and governance risk has improved from High at project approval to Moderate in current rating, indicating reduced but persistent governance fragility affecting implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance High Moderate Moderate [Risk Category Rating at Approval vs Last Approved Rating vs Proposed Rating]

risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability remains at Moderate risk level, suggesting ongoing challenges with government and local health authority capacity to sustain project activities and manage health service delivery.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability Substantial Moderate Moderate

risk_title: Delayed Project Effectiveness and Disbursement Start
risk_summary: Project became effective in February 2021 but actual disbursement did not start until December 2021, indicating governance and institutional delays in project operationalization that may reflect implementation capacity constraints.
evidence_quote: The project was approved in February 2020 and became effective on February 18, 2021, with actual disbursement starting in December 2021.
